scripts.sim:balance: tsc --rootDir . --outDir .balance-sim --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck scripts/balance-sim.ts && node .balance-sim/scripts/balance-sim.js
scripts.test:smoke: tsc --rootDir . --outDir .smoke-test --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck scripts/smoke-test.ts && node .smoke-test/scripts/smoke-test.js
